titleStmt.title: SII 9.322: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 322. (A.R. No. 68 of 1904.) ON A SLAB LYING ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE ENTRANCE TO THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE BENAKAPPA TEMPLE AT ORUVAY, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Vikramakāla, Ānanda, Phālguṇa, śu. 15, Ādivāra, corresponding probably to A.D. 1195 February 26 Sunday, when a certain Ēchiseṭṭi is said to have built a temple of Vināyaka and Immaḍi-Rāchamalladēva, son of Iruṅgōḷadēva and grandson of Rāchamalladēva of the Sinda family, is said to have granted some land and some amount of toll-revenue for the service of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadvighnēśvaraṁ śaṁkarasutanamarēṁdrāsurēṁdrōragēṁdra
stōmabyāvarṇnanaprōṁnatapadakamaḷaṁ rakṣisuttirkadhīśaṁ prēmaṁ kai
gaṇmalīyaṁ balivesaresevī yēciseṭṭipramukhyaṁgī mārttaṁḍaṁbaru
ḷḷaṁnegavamaravaraṁ sarvvavēdārtthavēdyaṁ . navaratnavrātadindaṁ jaraṭhakamaṭha
pāṭhīnasaṁtānadiṁdudghavanēbhaprōdbhavaprōṁnatakaḷabhasamūhaṁ
gaḷiṁ nakracakrapravarabyāḷāvaḷīkarkaṭakaṭakadināśiṁśumāra
dinānāravadiṁdaṁ nāḍeyuṁ ghūrṇisuvudadhikagaṁbhīrabhadraṁ samu
draṁ . Ā samudrada suttiṁgoḷagāda jaṁbūdvīpabhūpāḷacaṁca
kkirīṭāyamānavāda mērugiriya teṁkaṇa bhāratavaru
ḷanēkajanapadātiśayamenisi ballakuṁdeyeṁba nāḍuṁṭadaṟa
surēndranājñeyaṁ maṁdaragirīṁdraparivēṣṭisidudeṁbaṁtiru(ṁ)nnatikevetta
prākāradiṁ rājadhāni kuṟugōḍesevadā puravarādhīśvaraguṇaprabhāvameṁ
teṁdaḍe . varagāṁbhīryyadoḷudghadānaguṇadoḷu sauṁdaryadoḷdhairyyadoḷva
rasatyavratadoḷu parākramadoḷattyaiśvaryyadoḷtējadoḷatividyāprakaraṁ
gaḷoḷu dayeyoḷaṁ śrīpārbbatīśāṁghrinirbharabhaktaravibhu rācamallane
sedaṁ śrīsiṁdavaṁśōdbhavaṁ . Ātana tanayaṁ bhuvanakhyātiyoḷesedirdda na
ḷana nahuṣana prithumāṁdhātara doreyenisidananvitaniruṁgōḷadēvanu
rbbīpāḷaṁ . tattanayaṁ . stirasatyavadirmmaḍi baṁdhurataradānādisakaḷaguṇadirmmaḍi
yiṁ dorevettudu pesariṁtī dharegirmmaḍirācamalladēvanoḷenasaṁ . Enisi rā
jyaṁgeyyutirppinavā nāḍoḷ . tiḷigoḻadiṁ beḷegeyyiṁ giḷiviṁḍiṁ pūta puṟpa
vanadiṁ vanadiṁ toḷapa kalidēvaniḷayada beḷakadinī yōruvāyi sogayisu
tirkkuṁ . Iṁtoppuvōruvāyoḷu saṁtaṁ nityaṁ basaṁtavasadaḷaveseyalu kaṁtuni
bharūpanatiguṇavaṁtaṁ dhare pogaḷe negaḷdanaṁbaliyaicaṁ . kuladīpanaicaṁge ku
lavadhuvene negaḷdāmārakabbega vogedarkuḷatiḷakarcākaṇa virupa lasadguṇavaṁ
tanēcanenipa suputrar . Avaroḷagēcaṁgaṁ bhūbhuvanastuteyenipa mallaṇisa
tige samudbhavisidarā māraṇanutsavadiṁdaṁ kapaḷiseṭṭiyeṁbarttanayar . ta
nayarene matiyoḷēcaṁ vinayāṁbudhi vighnarājaniḷayamanenasuṁ mana
dolaviṁ māḍisidaṁ kanakādriyanalligaḍedu kaṁḍarisidavōl . Alli vighnēśvarana
pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi samastadhanādidānadiṁ mānyaraṁ maṁnisi sukhadiniralu svasti
śrīmatu vikramagālada Ānaṁdasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa śuddha 15 Ādivāradandu śrī
madimmaḍirācamallabhūpa śrīvināyakadēvara caitrapavitrakkaṁ nivēdyakkavaṁgabhō
garaṁgabhōgakhaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkeṁdu koṭṭa keyi kurugōḍadāriyiṁ teṁka
lādiyāda kaṭahaḷḷaparyyaṁta ma 2 mattaṁ lekkeyabāgiṁ teṁkaliṁge sa
ma 1 baḍagaṇa kēriyalli nivēśana 1 koṭṭalli hoṁge mā 1 koṁḍalli mā 1 rāśige
1 gāṇa 1 tōṭa 1 Ele hēṟige 100 hoṟege 50 .
Digital edition of SII 9.322 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
